html:query.declare: <DATA action="JPivot" URL="htmlgen_flow_15152009022415051929.html" oi_aniomes="17" oi_empresa="1" MDX=" with member [Measures].[TotalGral] as 'Sum({[Estructura].[Todo las Estructuras]}, [Measures].[CantPers])' member [Measures].[%] as '([Measures].[CantPers] / [Measures].[TotalGral])', FORMAT_STRING = '#%' member [Measures].[Personas] as '[Measures].[CantPers]' member [Measures].[Promedio] as 'avg({[Estructura].CurrentMember,[Estructura].Children},[Measures].[TotPagado] )' member [Measures].[Minimo] as 'Min({[Estructura].CurrentMember,[Estructura].Children},[Measures].[TotPagado] )' member [Measures].[Maximo] as 'Max({[Estructura].CurrentMember,[Estructura].Children},[Measures].[TotPagado] )' select NON EMPTY {[Measures].[Promedio], [Measures].[Minimo],[Measures].[Maximo] , [Measures].[Personas], [Measures].[%]} ON COLUMNS, NON EMPTY Hierarchize(Union([Estructura].[Todo las Estructuras].[Energil C S.A.].Children, [Estructura].[Todo las Estructuras].[Energil C S.A.].Children )) ON ROWS from [SUELDOS] where {([Tiempo].[2008].[05/2008],[Empresas].[Energil C S.A.])}" serverOPLAP="http://opus:8080/mondrian"/>

td.span: Seleccione los parámetros y presione ejecutar
